scenarios.rationale: The operating system (RHEL 8) is already on a current version per the provided lifecycle rules.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch to standard Linux Operating System
scenarios.rationale: The application already runs on a standard Linux distribution (RHEL 8).
The application is already deployed on AWS, On-premise and uses a portable stack, so ARM-based hosting is a credible optimization option.
The current application server (Apache Tomcat  8.0) is assessed as EOL, which makes replacement relevant.

scenarios.scenario_name: Application Migration to Cloud Infrastructure (Lift & Shift)
scenarios.rationale: The application is already deployed in AWS, On-premise.
The application is already cloud-hosted, but the source data does not show containerization yet.
The application is custom-built and integration-heavy, so decoupling and refactoring would likely improve modernization outcomes.
The database (MySQL 8.0) is already current according to the provided lifecycle rules.

scenarios.scenario_name: Switch DB Engine to open-source database solution
scenarios.rationale: The application already uses an open-source or open-source-based database engine (MySQL 8.0).
The technology assessment found 2 EOL and 0 outdated component(s).
